"'''Duel'''" is a short story by [[Timothy Zahn]] in the [[Star Wars: Short Story Collection|''Hasbro Short Story Collection'']]. During the aftermath of the [[Battle of Axion]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] engaged a [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droid]] in close combat. ''Duel'' is offered as a free download on [[StarWars.com]].
